nodes.label: Medium Clone
nodes.description: Screenshot of a Medium.com landing page clone. Features a centered hero section with serif headline 'Human stories & ideas that matter', a subtitle 'A welcoming place to read, write, and deepen your understanding of the world.', and a dark 'Start reading →' CTA button. Navigation bar shows Medium logo top-left and 'Sign In' / 'Get Started' buttons top-right. Minimal, clean design with light gray background.

nodes.label: Hero Section
nodes.description: Centered hero layout with large serif headline, subtitle text, and primary CTA button

nodes.label: Navigation Bar
nodes.description: Top navigation bar with Medium logo on left, Sign In and Get Started buttons on right

nodes.label: Start Reading CTA Button
nodes.description: Dark rounded CTA button with text 'Start reading →' centered below hero text
